datasheet.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY VEHICLE units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.
datasheet.name: Talonmaster

datasheet.text: While a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY VEHICLE unit is within 6" of this model, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.
datasheet.name: Nowhere to Hide

datasheet.text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal , Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, if this model is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this model can make a Normal move of up to 6".
datasheet.name: Master of Manoeuvre

unit_composition.text: twin assault cannon; twin heavy bolter; power weapon.
unit_composition.label: This model is equipped with
